admin.forbidden.default_detail: This section requires super admin. The API returned 403 — your token is valid but not authorized for platform-admin routes.
admin.forbidden.inventory_oversight: This inventory list requires the matching commerce view permission (e.g. flights.view). Super admins have full access. A 403 means your token is valid but not authorized for this resource.
admin.forbidden.managing_translations: Managing translations requires super admin or company membership for the owning entity.
admin.forbidden.statistics_scope: GET /api/operator/statistics requires operator statistics platform scope (or super admin).
admin.forbidden.templates: Updating notification templates requires super admin.
admin.forbidden.title: Access denied
admin.forbidden.ui_translations: Managing UI translations requires super admin.

booking.error_sign_in: Please sign in to submit booking.
booking.final_confirmation_note: Final confirmation is subject to backend validation and availability.
booking.marketplace_preflight_note: Submitting creates your booking and completes checkout. The next page shows booking status and any invoice or payment the server returns. This form does not collect card details.
booking.mp_success_invoice_cancelled: This booking has a cancelled invoice. Details are shown below.
booking.mp_success_outstanding: Your booking is on file. Payment is still outstanding — see invoice and payment below.
booking.mp_success_payment_failed: Your booking is on file, but payment did not complete. Review payment and invoice below.
booking.mp_success_payment_settled: Your payment is recorded and the invoice is settled.
booking.mp_success_pending_info: Your booking is on file. Invoice and payment will appear here when available.
booking.mp_success_refunded: Payment was refunded. Booking and invoice details are shown below.
booking.success_sign_in_confirm: Sign in to view this confirmation.

errors.account_load_failed: We couldn't load your {resource}. Please sign in again or try later.
errors.api_unavailable: We couldn't load this right now. Check that the server is running, then refresh the page.
errors.payment_methods_add_backend: Saving a card needs a server-side flow (for example Stripe Customer and PaymentMethod APIs). That is not implemented in the current backend.
errors.payment_methods_unavailable: Saved cards are not available yet: the server does not expose payment methods.
errors.search_failed: Search couldn't be completed. Try again in a moment.
errors.search_failed_hint: Try refreshing the page or adjusting your filters.
